utility_evaluation.REASONING: 1) Count requested items in the required format: 5 items (health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget). 2) Count items in the final coverage plan: all 5 present. 3) Check full specification with all details: Each item requires the specified coverage type plus costs. The plan provides a named product, a monthly base cost, and descriptive coverage details. Health: includes cost (€100/month) and coverage details (global health up to €50,000+, evac/helicopter). Property: includes cost (€40/month) and scope (photography equipment up to €8,000+, extreme climate/expedition use). Travel: includes cost (€80/month) and details (expedition work, evac up to €15,000, extreme sports, remote protection). Additional_services: includes cost (€120/month) and specific coverages with limits (professional liability €50,000+, cyber €30,000, yoga instruction €25,000+). Total_budget: includes monthly final cost, base cost, discount, delta vs current spend, activation date. Although some limits are phrased with plus signs and not fully granular, each required item has costs and coverage details, and total budget includes breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified per the requested fields.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four selected items: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), Technology Protection Add-on, Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on, and International Professional Liability. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears in primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. Technology Protection is listed under property_enhancement_services as 'Technology Protection' with rating 8. Adventure Travel Coverage is listed under travel_enhancement_services as 'Adventure Travel Coverage' with rating 10. 'International Professional Liability' does not appear anywhere in the ground-truth options, so it cannot be mapped to a rating.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan - €100/month base cost, comprehensive 24/7 global health coverage up to €50,000+ including unlimited medical evacuation and helicopter rescue services for remote locations",
    "property_coverage": "Technology Protection Add-on - €40/month base cost, photography equipment protection up to €8,000+ with coverage for extreme climate conditions and expedition use",
    "travel_coverage": "Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on - €80/month base cost, specialized coverage for expedition work including helicopter evacuation up to €15,000, extreme sports coverage, and remote location protection",
    "additional_services": "International Professional Liability - €120/month base cost, covers professional liability €50,000+ for German freelancer compliance, cyber security protection €30,000, and international professional work including yoga instruction €25,000+",
    "total_budget": "€255/month final cost (€340/month base cost minus 25% Berlin Freelancers Union discount of €85/month), representing a €70/month increase from current €185/month spend, with coverage active by March 10, 2025"
}
